name: Diamond Genesis Drop #09 — Summit Invite
description:
An invitation to the annual Diamond virtual summit — keynote, AI-worker live demos, holder-only AMA with Bryant and the Royal Ruby team, and a year-in-review treasury report.

Unlockable perk: 1 confirmed seat at Diamond Summit (virtual).

Membership access only. No revenue claims, no profit sharing. Educational and community-utility content. See docs/UTILITY-PERKS.md.
